generated_for: Pratham Ecosystem Runtime Integration and Production Hardening

integration_proof.attachment: Both products attach from published manifests through the generic attachment API.
integration_proof.sessions: One product-scoped session is created for UniGuru and one for Samruddhi.
integration_proof.routing: Intent routing resolves only registered manifest intent IDs.
integration_proof.payload_projection: Manifest option dispatch.options.request_body=payload sends native product request bodies without runtime product branches.

hardening_proof.fastapi_production_deployment: Docker Compose runs the FastAPI runtime through Uvicorn worker/proxy settings with /ready healthchecks.
hardening_proof.opentelemetry: FastAPI and runtime dispatch/attachment-health spans are instrumented and exported to the OpenTelemetry Collector over OTLP.
hardening_proof.prometheus: Runtime Prometheus text exposition is available at /metrics; the collector Prometheus exporter is available on :8889.
hardening_proof.failure_recovery: Simulated HTTP outage degrades one attachment; healthy check restores it.
hardening_proof.restart_validation: BHIV attachments, sessions, and routes survive CompanionRuntime recreation.
hardening_proof.multi_instance_validation: Two runtime instances share persisted attachments and sessions; one instance dispatches routes created by the other and continues after the first stops.
hardening_proof.load_validation: 30 concurrent BHIV dispatches complete successfully in focused tests.
hardening_proof.k6_load_profile: scripts/load/k6_companion_runtime.js runs a ramping-vus production load scenario against UniGuru and Samruddhi through published contracts.
hardening_proof.production_readiness_gate: scripts/production_readiness_gate.py verifies non-root/read-only/restart/resource-bounded container posture, runbooks, SLOs, observability outputs, and evidence files.

product_scope_note.scope_clarification: The clarified assignment validates multiple independent BHIV products using UniGuru and Samruddhi/trade-bot as the two independent products in scope.
product_scope_note.resolution: The assignment-scoped independent BHIV products are integrated through published contracts only; a third product can be added later by publishing another manifest without runtime code changes.
